note: Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold/IsManifold/Basic.lean:786 - `class IsManifold (I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H) (n : ℕ∞ω) (M : Type*) ... extends HasGroupoid M (contDiffGroupoid n I)`, generic over any NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜 and smoothness n; a complex manifold is the specific instantiation 𝕜=ℂ, n=ω (contDiffGroupoid ω uses ContDiffOn ℂ ω transition maps, i.e. holomorphic atlas) - no dedicated `ComplexManifold` decl exists.
